title: Wenko Tortona white toilet set - toilet brush holder, closed form, metal, 9.5 x 38.5 x 9.5 cm, white, 395 grams
features: BATHROOM ESSENTIAL The Tortona closed toilet brush holder in painted steel combines white design with elegant bamboo elements for a stylish accent to your bathroom
Nice gimmick: the toilet brush set has a replaceable brush head. The black brush head has a diameter of 7.5 cm and is an indispensable bathroom utensil
DURABLE & EASY CARE Made of high quality painted steel, our WENKO toilet brush holder is not only aesthetically pleasing, but also durable and easy to clean
SPACE SAVING DESIGN Measuring diameter 9.5 x 38.5 cm, the closed toilet brush holder offers a compact solution that makes the most of your space while creating a modern vibe
Stylish symbiosis: the combination of black and bamboo not only gives your bathroom a contemporary look, but also shows your sensitivity to high quality design and environmental awareness
description: From the manufacturer Overview Charming soap dispensers and dishes, toothbrush tumblers, cosmetic jars, hooks, racks and toilet brushes. At WENKO you will find various style collections, which can be combined to complete your bathroom ambiance with a variety of matching bathroom accessories in various shapes and designs. The bathroom accessories form the "Colors" style collection convince with their perfectly shaped design and abundance of paradise colors from radiant to pastel. About Us The name WENKO has stood for continuous success since the end of the 1950s. WENKO, the name for ranges of products for your bathroom, kitchen, laundry and living, always pursuing 'The better idea' with ingenuity and innovative power, is characterised by a high degree of user convenience and a fair price-performance ratio. Discover beautiful bath and comfortable household ideas. We hope you enjoy and be inspired!
